title: OLX India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: OLX India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the OLX India family as a Full Stack Developer in Visakhapatnam. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About OLX India:
OLX India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with OLX India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
